notes: Old model booked the driver's net as company revenue and rental as a cost (cost-profiles.computeRealPnl: gross - rental - salary - fuel - other); corrected so company revenue = rental income + 50% Bolt tier bonus and driver net is only the bonus-tier input. GAP FOR MASTER: finance.js's core R-model/bonus correction was ALREADY shipped (P1/P2/P3a, modelAwarePnL=true) so I sourced its bonus schedule from the new pnl-engine rather than regress it; the LIVE driver_cost_profiles overlay in orchestrator.js lines ~1030-1039 still inlines the old 'gross - monthly_costs' model (rental as a cost) and must be rewired to computeRealPnl/pnl-engine by the orchestrator-owning session to take user-facing effect.
